◆ mutt_pager()

int mutt_pager ( struct PagerView *  pview)

Display a an email, attachment, or help, in a window.

Parameters
pviewPager view settings
Return values
0Success
-1Error

This pager is actually not so simple as it once was. But it will be again. Currently it operates in 3 modes:

  • viewing messages. (PAGER_MODE_EMAIL)
  • viewing attachments. (PAGER_MODE_ATTACH)
  • viewing other stuff (e.g. help). (PAGER_MODE_OTHER) These can be distinguished by PagerMode in PagerView. Data is not yet polymorphic and is fused into a single struct (PagerData). Different elements of PagerData are expected to be present depending on the mode:
  • PAGER_MODE_EMAIL expects data->email and not expects data->body
  • PAGER_MODE_ATTACH expects data->email and data->body special sub-case of this mode is viewing attached email message it is recognized by presence of data->fp and data->body->email
  • PAGER_MODE_OTHER does not expect data->email or data->body

Definition at line 2330 of file dlg_pager.c.

2331 {
2332  //===========================================================================
2333  // ACT 1 - Ensure sanity of the caller and determine the mode
2334  //===========================================================================
2335  assert(pview);
2336  assert((pview->mode > PAGER_MODE_UNKNOWN) && (pview->mode < PAGER_MODE_MAX));
2337  assert(pview->pdata); // view can't exist in a vacuum
2338  assert(pview->win_pager);
2339  assert(pview->win_pbar);
2340 
2341  switch (pview->mode)
2342  {
2343  case PAGER_MODE_EMAIL:
2344  // This case was previously identified by IsEmail macro
2345  // we expect data to contain email and not contain body
2346  // We also expect email to always belong to some mailbox
2347  assert(pview->pdata->email);
2348  assert(pview->pdata->ctx);
2349  assert(pview->pdata->ctx->mailbox);
2350  assert(!pview->pdata->body);
2351 
2352  break;
2353 
2354  case PAGER_MODE_ATTACH:
2355  // this case was previously identified by IsAttach and IsMsgAttach
2356  // macros, we expect data to contain:
2357  // - body (viewing regular attachment)
2358  // - email
2359  // - fp and body->email in special case of viewing an attached email.
2360  assert(pview->pdata->email); // This should point to the top level email
2361  assert(pview->pdata->body);
2362  assert(pview->pdata->ctx);
2363  assert(pview->pdata->ctx->mailbox);
2364  if (pview->pdata->fp && pview->pdata->body->email)
2365  {
2366  // Special case: attachment is a full-blown email message.
2367  // Yes, emails can contain other emails.
2368  pview->mode = PAGER_MODE_ATTACH_E;
2369  }
2370  break;
2371 
2372  case PAGER_MODE_HELP:
2373  case PAGER_MODE_OTHER:
2374  assert(!pview->pdata->email);
2375  assert(!pview->pdata->body);
2376  assert(!pview->pdata->ctx);
2377  break;
2378 
2379  case PAGER_MODE_UNKNOWN:
2380  case PAGER_MODE_MAX:
2381  default:
2382  // Unexpected mode. Catch fire and explode.
2383  // This *should* happen if mode is PAGER_MODE_ATTACH_E, since
2384  // we do not expect any caller to pass it to us.
2385  assert(false);
2386  break;
2387  }
2388 
2389  //===========================================================================
2390  // ACT 2 - Declare, initialize local variables, read config, etc.
2391  //===========================================================================
2392 
2393  //---------- reading config values ------------------------------------------
2394  const bool c_pager_stop = cs_subset_bool(NeoMutt->sub, "pager_stop");
2395  const short c_pager_context = cs_subset_number(NeoMutt->sub, "pager_context");
2396  const short c_pager_index_lines =
2397  cs_subset_number(NeoMutt->sub, "pager_index_lines");
2398  const short c_search_context =
2399  cs_subset_number(NeoMutt->sub, "search_context");
2400  const short c_skip_quoted_offset =
2401  cs_subset_number(NeoMutt->sub, "skip_quoted_offset");
2402 
2403  //---------- local variables ------------------------------------------------
2404  struct Mailbox *m = pview->pdata->ctx ? pview->pdata->ctx->mailbox : NULL;
2405  struct IndexSharedData *shared = dialog_find(pview->win_pager)->wdata;
2406 
2407  struct Menu *pager_menu = NULL;
2408  char buf[1024] = { 0 };
2409  int op = 0;
2410  int rc = -1;
2411  int searchctx = 0;
2412  int index_space = m ? MIN(c_pager_index_lines, m->vcount) : c_pager_index_lines;
2413  bool first = true;
2414  bool wrapped = false;
2415  enum MailboxType mailbox_type = m ? m->type : MUTT_UNKNOWN;
2416 
2417  struct PagerPrivateData *priv = pview->win_pager->parent->wdata;
2418  priv->win_pbar = pview->win_pbar;
2419 
2420  //---------- setup flags ----------------------------------------------------
2421  if (!(pview->flags & MUTT_SHOWCOLOR))
2422  pview->flags |= MUTT_SHOWFLAT;
2423 
2424  if (pview->mode == PAGER_MODE_EMAIL && !pview->pdata->email->read)
2425  {
2426  pview->pdata->ctx->msg_in_pager = pview->pdata->email->msgno;
2427  priv->win_pbar->actions |= WA_RECALC;
2428  mutt_set_flag(m, pview->pdata->email, MUTT_READ, true);
2429  }
2430  //---------- setup help menu ------------------------------------------------
2431  pview->win_pager->help_data = pager_resolve_help_mapping(pview->mode, mailbox_type);
2432  pview->win_pager->help_menu = MENU_PAGER;
2433 
2434  //---------- initialize redraw pdata -----------------------------------------
2435  pview->win_pager->size = MUTT_WIN_SIZE_MAXIMISE;
2436  priv->pview = pview;
2437  priv->indexlen = c_pager_index_lines;
2438  priv->indicator = priv->indexlen / 3;
2439  priv->max_line = LINES; // number of lines on screen, from curses
2440  priv->line_info = mutt_mem_calloc(priv->max_line, sizeof(struct Line));
2441  priv->fp = fopen(pview->pdata->fname, "r");
2442  priv->has_types =
2443  ((pview->mode == PAGER_MODE_EMAIL) || (pview->flags & MUTT_SHOWCOLOR)) ?
2444  MUTT_TYPES :
2445  0; // main message or rfc822 attachment
2446 
2447  for (size_t i = 0; i < priv->max_line; i++)
2448  {
2449  priv->line_info[i].type = -1;
2450  priv->line_info[i].search_cnt = -1;
2451  priv->line_info[i].syntax = mutt_mem_malloc(sizeof(struct TextSyntax));
2452  (priv->line_info[i].syntax)[0].first = -1;
2453  (priv->line_info[i].syntax)[0].last = -1;
2454  }
2455 
2456  // ---------- try to open the pdata file -------------------------------------
2457  if (!priv->fp)
2458  {
2459  mutt_perror(pview->pdata->fname);
2460  return -1;
2461  }
2462 
2463  if (stat(pview->pdata->fname, &priv->sb) != 0)
2464  {
2465  mutt_perror(pview->pdata->fname);
2466  mutt_file_fclose(&priv->fp);
2467  return -1;
2468  }
2469  unlink(pview->pdata->fname);
2470 
2471  //---------- setup pager menu------------------------------------------------
2472  pager_menu = pview->win_pager->wdata;
2473  pager_menu->win_ibar = pview->win_pbar;
2474  pager_menu->custom_redraw = pager_custom_redraw;
2475  priv->menu = pager_menu;
2476 
2477  //---------- restore global state if needed ---------------------------------
2478  while (pview->mode == PAGER_MODE_EMAIL && (OldEmail == pview->pdata->email) // are we "resuming" to the same Email?
2479  && (TopLine != priv->topline) // is saved offset different?
2480  && priv->line_info[priv->curline].offset < (priv->sb.st_size - 1))
2481  {
2482  // needed to avoid SIGSEGV
2483  pager_custom_redraw(pager_menu);
2484  // trick user, as if nothing happened
2485  // scroll down to previosly saved offset
2486  priv->topline =
2487  ((TopLine - priv->topline) > priv->lines) ? priv->topline + priv->lines : TopLine;
2488  }
2489 
2490  TopLine = 0;
2491  OldEmail = NULL;
2492 
2493  //---------- show windows, set focus and visibility --------------------------
2494  if (priv->pview->win_index)
2495  {
2496  priv->menu = priv->pview->win_index->wdata;
2497  priv->pview->win_index->size = MUTT_WIN_SIZE_FIXED;
2498  priv->pview->win_index->req_rows = index_space;
2499  priv->pview->win_index->parent->size = MUTT_WIN_SIZE_MINIMISE;
2500  window_set_visible(priv->pview->win_index->parent, (index_space > 0));
2501  }
2502  window_set_visible(priv->pview->win_pager->parent, true);
2503  mutt_window_reflow(dialog_find(priv->pview->win_pager));
2504  window_set_focus(pview->win_pager);
2505 
2506  //---------- jump to the bottom if requested ------------------------------
2507  if (pview->flags & MUTT_PAGER_BOTTOM)
2508  {
2509  jump_to_bottom(priv, pview);
2510  }
2511 
2512  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------
2513  // ACT 3: Read user input and decide what to do with it
2514  // ...but also do a whole lot of other things.
2515  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------
2516  while (op != -1)
2517  {
2518  mutt_curses_set_cursor(MUTT_CURSOR_INVISIBLE);
2519 
2520  menu_queue_redraw(pager_menu, MENU_REDRAW_FULL);
2521  window_redraw(NULL);
2522  pager_custom_redraw(pager_menu);
2523 
2524  const bool c_braille_friendly =
2525  cs_subset_bool(NeoMutt->sub, "braille_friendly");
2526  if (c_braille_friendly)
2527  {
2528  if (braille_row != -1)
2529  {
2530  mutt_window_move(priv->pview->win_pager, braille_col, braille_row + 1);
2531  braille_row = -1;
2532  }
2533  }
2534  else
2535  mutt_window_move(priv->pview->win_pbar, priv->pview->win_pager->state.cols - 1, 0);
2536 
2537  // force redraw of the screen at every iteration of the event loop
2538  mutt_refresh();
2539 
2540  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------
2541  // Check if information in the status bar needs an update
2542  // This is done because pager is a single-threaded application, which
2543  // tries to emulate cuncurency.
2544  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------
2545  bool do_new_mail = false;
2546  if (m && !OptAttachMsg)
2547  {
2548  int oldcount = m->msg_count;
2549  /* check for new mail */
2550  enum MxStatus check = mx_mbox_check(m);
2551  if (check == MX_STATUS_ERROR)
2552  {
2553  if (!m || mutt_buffer_is_empty(&m->pathbuf))
2554  {
2555  /* fatal error occurred */
2556  menu_queue_redraw(pager_menu, MENU_REDRAW_FULL);
2557  break;
2558  }
2559  }
2560  else if ((check == MX_STATUS_NEW_MAIL) || (check == MX_STATUS_REOPENED) ||
2561  (check == MX_STATUS_FLAGS))
2562  {
2563  /* notify user of newly arrived mail */
2564  if (check == MX_STATUS_NEW_MAIL)
2565  {
2566  for (size_t i = oldcount; i < m->msg_count; i++)
2567  {
2568  struct Email *e = m->emails[i];
2569 
2570  if (e && !e->read)
2571  {
2572  mutt_message(_("New mail in this mailbox"));
2573  do_new_mail = true;
2574  break;
2575  }
2576  }
2577  }
2578 
2579  if ((check == MX_STATUS_NEW_MAIL) || (check == MX_STATUS_REOPENED))
2580  {
2581  if (priv->menu && m)
2582  {
2583  /* After the mailbox has been updated, selection might be invalid */
2584  int index = menu_get_index(priv->menu);
2585  menu_set_index(priv->menu, MIN(index, MAX(m->msg_count - 1, 0)));
2586  index = menu_get_index(priv->menu);
2587  struct Email *e = mutt_get_virt_email(m, index);
2588  if (!e)
2589  continue;
2590 
2591  bool verbose = m->verbose;
2592  m->verbose = false;
2593  mutt_update_index(priv->menu, pview->pdata->ctx, check, oldcount, shared);
2594  m->verbose = verbose;
2595 
2596  priv->menu->max = m->vcount;
2597 
2598  /* If these header pointers don't match, then our email may have
2599  * been deleted. Make the pointer safe, then leave the pager.
2600  * This have a unpleasant behaviour to close the pager even the
2601  * deleted message is not the opened one, but at least it's safe. */
2602  e = mutt_get_virt_email(m, index);
2603  if (pview->pdata->email != e)
2604  {
2605  pview->pdata->email = e;
2606  break;
2607  }
2608  }
2609 
2610  menu_queue_redraw(pager_menu, MENU_REDRAW_FULL);
2611  OptSearchInvalid = true;
2612  }
2613  }
2614 
2615  if (mutt_mailbox_notify(m) || do_new_mail)
2616  {
2617  const bool c_beep_new = cs_subset_bool(NeoMutt->sub, "beep_new");
2618  if (c_beep_new)
2619  mutt_beep(true);
2620  const char *const c_new_mail_command =
2621  cs_subset_string(NeoMutt->sub, "new_mail_command");
2622  if (c_new_mail_command)
2623  {
2624  char cmd[1024];
2625  menu_status_line(cmd, sizeof(cmd), shared, priv->menu, sizeof(cmd),
2626  NONULL(c_new_mail_command));
2627  if (mutt_system(cmd) != 0)
2628  mutt_error(_("Error running \"%s\""), cmd);
2629  }
2630  }
2631  }
2632  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------
2633 
2634  if (SigWinch)
2635  {
2636  SigWinch = false;
2637  mutt_resize_screen();
2638  clearok(stdscr, true); /* force complete redraw */
2639  msgwin_clear_text();
2640 
2641  if (pview->flags & MUTT_PAGER_RETWINCH)
2642  {
2643  /* Store current position. */
2644  priv->lines = -1;
2645  for (size_t i = 0; i <= priv->topline; i++)
2646  if (!priv->line_info[i].continuation)
2647  priv->lines++;
2648 
2649  Resize = mutt_mem_malloc(sizeof(struct Resize));
2650 
2651  Resize->line = priv->lines;
2652  Resize->search_compiled = priv->search_compiled;
2653  Resize->search_back = priv->search_back;
2654 
2655  op = -1;
2656  rc = OP_REFORMAT_WINCH;
2657  }
2658  else
2659  {
2660  /* note: mutt_resize_screen() -> mutt_window_reflow() sets
2661  * MENU_REDRAW_FULL and MENU_REDRAW_FLOW */
2662  op = 0;
2663  }
2664  continue;
2665  }
2666  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------
2667  // Finally, read user's key press
2668  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------
2669  // km_dokey() reads not only user's key strokes, but also a MacroBuffer
2670  // MacroBuffer may contain OP codes of the operations.
2671  // MacroBuffer is global
2672  // OP codes inserted into the MacroBuffer by various functions.
2673  // One of such functions is `mutt_enter_command()`
2674  // Some OP codes are not handled by pager, they cause pager to quit returning
2675  // OP code to index. Index hadles the operation and then restarts pager
2676  op = km_dokey(MENU_PAGER);
2677 
2678  if (op >= 0)
2679  {
2680  mutt_clear_error();
2681  mutt_debug(LL_DEBUG1, "Got op %s (%d)\n", OpStrings[op][0], op);
2682  }
2683  mutt_curses_set_cursor(MUTT_CURSOR_VISIBLE);
2684 
2685  if (op < 0)
2686  {
2687  op = 0;
2688  mutt_timeout_hook();
2689  continue;
2690  }
2691 
2692  rc = op;
2693 
2694  switch (op)
2695  {
2696  //=======================================================================
2697 
2698  case OP_EXIT:
2699  rc = -1;
2700  op = -1;
2701  break;
2702 
2703  //=======================================================================
2704 
2705  case OP_QUIT:
2706  {
2707  const enum QuadOption c_quit = cs_subset_quad(NeoMutt->sub, "quit");
2708  if (query_quadoption(c_quit, _("Quit NeoMutt?")) == MUTT_YES)
2709  {
2710  /* avoid prompting again in the index menu */
2711  cs_subset_str_native_set(NeoMutt->sub, "quit", MUTT_YES, NULL);
2712  op = -1;
2713  }
2714  break;
2715  }
2716 
2717  //=======================================================================
2718 
2719  case OP_NEXT_PAGE:
2720  if (priv->line_info[priv->curline].offset < (priv->sb.st_size - 1))
2721  {
2722  priv->topline = up_n_lines(c_pager_context, priv->line_info,
2723  priv->curline, priv->hide_quoted);
2724  }
2725  else if (c_pager_stop)
2726  {
2727  /* emulate "less -q" and don't go on to the next message. */
2728  mutt_message(_("Bottom of message is shown"));
2729  }
2730  else
2731  {
2732  /* end of the current message, so display the next message. */
2733  rc = OP_MAIN_NEXT_UNDELETED;
2734  op = -1;
2735  }
2736  break;
2737 
2738  //=======================================================================
2739 
2740  case OP_PREV_PAGE:
2741  if (priv->topline == 0)
2742  {
2743  mutt_message(_("Top of message is shown"));
2744  }
2745  else
2746  {
2747  priv->topline =
2748  up_n_lines(priv->pview->win_pager->state.rows - c_pager_context,
2749  priv->line_info, priv->topline, priv->hide_quoted);
2750  }
2751  break;
2752 
2753  //=======================================================================
2754 
2755  case OP_NEXT_LINE:
2756  if (priv->line_info[priv->curline].offset < (priv->sb.st_size - 1))
2757  {
2758  priv->topline++;
2759  if (priv->hide_quoted)
2760  {
2761  while ((priv->line_info[priv->topline].type == MT_COLOR_QUOTED) &&
2762  (priv->topline < priv->last_line))
2763  {
2764  priv->topline++;
2765  }
2766  }
2767  }
2768  else
2769  mutt_message(_("Bottom of message is shown"));
2770  break;
2771 
2772  //=======================================================================
2773 
2774  case OP_PREV_LINE:
2775  if (priv->topline)
2776  priv->topline = up_n_lines(1, priv->line_info, priv->topline, priv->hide_quoted);
2777  else
2778  mutt_message(_("Top of message is shown"));
2779  break;
2780 
2781  //=======================================================================
2782 
2783  case OP_PAGER_TOP:
2784  if (priv->topline)
2785  priv->topline = 0;
2786  else
2787  mutt_message(_("Top of message is shown"));
2788  break;
2789 
2790  //=======================================================================
2791 
2792  case OP_HALF_UP:
2793  if (priv->topline)
2794  {
2795  priv->topline = up_n_lines(priv->pview->win_pager->state.rows / 2 +
2796  (priv->pview->win_pager->state.rows % 2),
2797  priv->line_info, priv->topline, priv->hide_quoted);
2798  }
2799  else
2800  mutt_message(_("Top of message is shown"));
2801  break;
2802 
2803  //=======================================================================
2804 
2805  case OP_HALF_DOWN:
2806  if (priv->line_info[priv->curline].offset < (priv->sb.st_size - 1))
2807  {
2808  priv->topline = up_n_lines(priv->pview->win_pager->state.rows / 2,
2809  priv->line_info, priv->curline, priv->hide_quoted);
2810  }
2811  else if (c_pager_stop)
2812  {
2813  /* emulate "less -q" and don't go on to the next message. */
2814  mutt_message(_("Bottom of message is shown"));
2815  }
2816  else
2817  {
2818  /* end of the current message, so display the next message. */
2819  rc = OP_MAIN_NEXT_UNDELETED;
2820  op = -1;
2821  }
2822  break;
2823 
2824  //=======================================================================
2825 
2826  case OP_SEARCH_NEXT:
2827  case OP_SEARCH_OPPOSITE:
2828  if (priv->search_compiled)
2829  {
2830  wrapped = false;
2831 
2832  if (c_search_context < priv->pview->win_pager->state.rows)
2833  searchctx = c_search_context;
2834  else
2835  searchctx = 0;
2836 
2837  search_next:
2838  if ((!priv->search_back && (op == OP_SEARCH_NEXT)) ||
2839  (priv->search_back && (op == OP_SEARCH_OPPOSITE)))
2840  {
2841  /* searching forward */
2842  int i;
2843  for (i = wrapped ? 0 : priv->topline + searchctx + 1; i < priv->last_line; i++)
2844  {
2845  if ((!priv->hide_quoted || (priv->line_info[i].type != MT_COLOR_QUOTED)) &&
2846  !priv->line_info[i].continuation && (priv->line_info[i].search_cnt > 0))
2847  {
2848  break;
2849  }
2850  }
2851 
2852  const bool c_wrap_search =
2853  cs_subset_bool(NeoMutt->sub, "wrap_search");
2854  if (i < priv->last_line)
2855  priv->topline = i;
2856  else if (wrapped || !c_wrap_search)
2857  mutt_error(_("Not found"));
2858  else
2859  {
2860  mutt_message(_("Search wrapped to top"));
2861  wrapped = true;
2862  goto search_next;
2863  }
2864  }
2865  else
2866  {
2867  /* searching backward */
2868  int i;
2869  for (i = wrapped ? priv->last_line : priv->topline + searchctx - 1; i >= 0; i--)
2870  {
2871  if ((!priv->hide_quoted ||
2872  (priv->has_types && (priv->line_info[i].type != MT_COLOR_QUOTED))) &&
2873  !priv->line_info[i].continuation && (priv->line_info[i].search_cnt > 0))
2874  {
2875  break;
2876  }
2877  }
2878 
2879  const bool c_wrap_search =
2880  cs_subset_bool(NeoMutt->sub, "wrap_search");
2881  if (i >= 0)
2882  priv->topline = i;
2883  else if (wrapped || !c_wrap_search)
2884  mutt_error(_("Not found"));
2885  else
2886  {
2887  mutt_message(_("Search wrapped to bottom"));
2888  wrapped = true;
2889  goto search_next;
2890  }
2891  }
2892 
2893  if (priv->line_info[priv->topline].search_cnt > 0)
2894  {
2895  priv->search_flag = MUTT_SEARCH;
2896  /* give some context for search results */
2897  if (priv->topline - searchctx > 0)
2898  priv->topline -= searchctx;
2899  }
2900 
2901  break;
2902  }
2903  /* no previous search pattern */
2904  /* fallthrough */
2905  //=======================================================================
2906 
2907  case OP_SEARCH:
2908  case OP_SEARCH_REVERSE:
2909  mutt_str_copy(buf, priv->searchbuf, sizeof(buf));
2910  if (mutt_get_field(((op == OP_SEARCH) || (op == OP_SEARCH_NEXT)) ?
2911  _("Search for: ") :
2912  _("Reverse search for: "),
2913  buf, sizeof(buf), MUTT_CLEAR | MUTT_PATTERN, false,
2914  NULL, NULL) != 0)
2915  {
2916  break;
2917  }
2918 
2919  if (strcmp(buf, priv->searchbuf) == 0)
2920  {
2921  if (priv->search_compiled)
2922  {
2923  /* do an implicit search-next */
2924  if (op == OP_SEARCH)
2925  op = OP_SEARCH_NEXT;
2926  else
2927  op = OP_SEARCH_OPPOSITE;
2928 
2929  wrapped = false;
2930  goto search_next;
2931  }
2932  }
2933 
2934  if (buf[0] == '\0')
2935  break;
2936 
2937  mutt_str_copy(priv->searchbuf, buf, sizeof(priv->searchbuf));
2938 
2939  /* leave search_back alone if op == OP_SEARCH_NEXT */
2940  if (op == OP_SEARCH)
2941  priv->search_back = false;
2942  else if (op == OP_SEARCH_REVERSE)
2943  priv->search_back = true;
2944 
2945  if (priv->search_compiled)
2946  {
2947  regfree(&priv->search_re);
2948  for (size_t i = 0; i < priv->last_line; i++)
2949  {
2950  FREE(&(priv->line_info[i].search));
2951  priv->line_info[i].search_cnt = -1;
2952  }
2953  }
2954 
2955  uint16_t rflags = mutt_mb_is_lower(priv->searchbuf) ? REG_ICASE : 0;
2956  int err = REG_COMP(&priv->search_re, priv->searchbuf, REG_NEWLINE | rflags);
2957  if (err != 0)
2958  {
2959  regerror(err, &priv->search_re, buf, sizeof(buf));
2960  mutt_error("%s", buf);
2961  for (size_t i = 0; i < priv->max_line; i++)
2962  {
2963  /* cleanup */
2964  FREE(&(priv->line_info[i].search));
2965  priv->line_info[i].search_cnt = -1;
2966  }
2967  priv->search_flag = 0;
2968  priv->search_compiled = false;
2969  }
2970  else
2971  {
2972  priv->search_compiled = true;
2973  /* update the search pointers */
2974  int line_num = 0;
2975  while (display_line(priv->fp, &priv->last_pos, &priv->line_info,
2976  line_num, &priv->last_line, &priv->max_line,
2977  MUTT_SEARCH | (pview->flags & MUTT_PAGER_NSKIP) |
2978  (pview->flags & MUTT_PAGER_NOWRAP),
2979  &priv->quote_list, &priv->q_level, &priv->force_redraw,
2980  &priv->search_re, priv->pview->win_pager) == 0)
2981  {
2982  line_num++;
2983  }
2984 
2985  if (!priv->search_back)
2986  {
2987  /* searching forward */
2988  int i;
2989  for (i = priv->topline; i < priv->last_line; i++)
2990  {
2991  if ((!priv->hide_quoted || (priv->line_info[i].type != MT_COLOR_QUOTED)) &&
2992  !priv->line_info[i].continuation && (priv->line_info[i].search_cnt > 0))
2993  {
2994  break;
2995  }
2996  }
2997 
2998  if (i < priv->last_line)
2999  priv->topline = i;
3000  }
3001  else
3002  {
3003  /* searching backward */
3004  int i;
3005  for (i = priv->topline; i >= 0; i--)
3006  {
3007  if ((!priv->hide_quoted || (priv->line_info[i].type != MT_COLOR_QUOTED)) &&
3008  !priv->line_info[i].continuation && (priv->line_info[i].search_cnt > 0))
3009  {
3010  break;
3011  }
3012  }
3013 
3014  if (i >= 0)
3015  priv->topline = i;
3016  }
3017 
3018  if (priv->line_info[priv->topline].search_cnt == 0)
3019  {
3020  priv->search_flag = 0;
3021  mutt_error(_("Not found"));
3022  }
3023  else
3024  {
3025  priv->search_flag = MUTT_SEARCH;
3026  /* give some context for search results */
3027  if (c_search_context < priv->pview->win_pager->state.rows)
3028  searchctx = c_search_context;
3029  else
3030  searchctx = 0;
3031  if (priv->topline - searchctx > 0)
3032  priv->topline -= searchctx;
3033  }
3034  }
3035  menu_queue_redraw(pager_menu, MENU_REDRAW_BODY);
3036  break;
3037 
3038  //=======================================================================
3039 
3040  case OP_SEARCH_TOGGLE:
3041  if (priv->search_compiled)
3042  {
3043  priv->search_flag ^= MUTT_SEARCH;
3044  menu_queue_redraw(pager_menu, MENU_REDRAW_BODY);
3045  }
3046  break;
3047 
3048  //=======================================================================
3049 
3050  case OP_SORT:
3051  case OP_SORT_REVERSE:
3052  if (!assert_pager_mode(pview->mode == PAGER_MODE_EMAIL))
3053  break;
3054  if (mutt_select_sort(op == OP_SORT_REVERSE))
3055  {
3056  OptNeedResort = true;
3057  op = -1;
3058  rc = OP_DISPLAY_MESSAGE;
3059  }
3060  break;
3061 
3062  //=======================================================================
3063 
3064  case OP_HELP:
3065  if (pview->mode == PAGER_MODE_HELP)
3066  {
3067  /* don't let the user enter the help-menu from the help screen! */
3068  mutt_error(_("Help is currently being shown"));
3069  break;
3070  }
3071  mutt_help(MENU_PAGER);
3072  menu_queue_redraw(pager_menu, MENU_REDRAW_FULL);
3073  break;
3074 
3075  //=======================================================================
3076 
3077  case OP_PAGER_HIDE_QUOTED:
3078  if (!priv->has_types)
3079  break;
3080 
3081  priv->hide_quoted ^= MUTT_HIDE;
3082  if (priv->hide_quoted && (priv->line_info[priv->topline].type == MT_COLOR_QUOTED))
3083  priv->topline = up_n_lines(1, priv->line_info, priv->topline, priv->hide_quoted);
3084  else
3085  menu_queue_redraw(pager_menu, MENU_REDRAW_BODY);
3086  break;
3087 
3088  //=======================================================================
3089 
3090  case OP_PAGER_SKIP_QUOTED:
3091  {
3092  if (!priv->has_types)
3093  break;
3094 
3095  int dretval = 0;
3096  int new_topline = priv->topline;
3097 
3098  /* Skip all the email headers */
3099  if (mutt_color_is_header(priv->line_info[new_topline].type))
3100  {
3101  while (((new_topline < priv->last_line) ||
3102  (0 == (dretval = display_line(
3103  priv->fp, &priv->last_pos, &priv->line_info,
3104  new_topline, &priv->last_line, &priv->max_line,
3105  MUTT_TYPES | (pview->flags & MUTT_PAGER_NOWRAP),
3106  &priv->quote_list, &priv->q_level, &priv->force_redraw,
3107  &priv->search_re, priv->pview->win_pager)))) &&
3108  mutt_color_is_header(priv->line_info[new_topline].type))
3109  {
3110  new_topline++;
3111  }
3112  priv->topline = new_topline;
3113  break;
3114  }
3115 
3116  while ((((new_topline + c_skip_quoted_offset) < priv->last_line) ||
3117  (0 == (dretval = display_line(
3118  priv->fp, &priv->last_pos, &priv->line_info, new_topline, &priv->last_line,
3119  &priv->max_line, MUTT_TYPES | (pview->flags & MUTT_PAGER_NOWRAP),
3120  &priv->quote_list, &priv->q_level, &priv->force_redraw,
3121  &priv->search_re, priv->pview->win_pager)))) &&
3122  (priv->line_info[new_topline + c_skip_quoted_offset].type != MT_COLOR_QUOTED))
3123  {
3124  new_topline++;
3125  }
3126 
3127  if (dretval < 0)
3128  {
3129  mutt_error(_("No more quoted text"));
3130  break;
3131  }
3132 
3133  while ((((new_topline + c_skip_quoted_offset) < priv->last_line) ||
3134  (0 == (dretval = display_line(
3135  priv->fp, &priv->last_pos, &priv->line_info, new_topline, &priv->last_line,
3136  &priv->max_line, MUTT_TYPES | (pview->flags & MUTT_PAGER_NOWRAP),
3137  &priv->quote_list, &priv->q_level, &priv->force_redraw,
3138  &priv->search_re, priv->pview->win_pager)))) &&
3139  (priv->line_info[new_topline + c_skip_quoted_offset].type == MT_COLOR_QUOTED))
3140  {
3141  new_topline++;
3142  }
3143 
3144  if (dretval < 0)
3145  {
3146  mutt_error(_("No more unquoted text after quoted text"));
3147  break;
3148  }
3149  priv->topline = new_topline;
3150  break;
3151  }
3152 
3153  //=======================================================================
3154 
3155  case OP_PAGER_SKIP_HEADERS:
3156  {
3157  if (!priv->has_types)
3158  break;
3159 
3160  int dretval = 0;
3161  int new_topline = priv->topline;
3162 
3163  if (!mutt_color_is_header(priv->line_info[new_topline].type))
3164  {
3165  /* L10N: Displayed if <skip-headers> is invoked in the pager, but we
3166  are already past the headers */
3167  mutt_message(_("Already skipped past headers"));
3168  break;
3169  }
3170 
3171  while (((new_topline < priv->last_line) ||
3172  (0 == (dretval = display_line(
3173  priv->fp, &priv->last_pos, &priv->line_info, new_topline, &priv->last_line,
3174  &priv->max_line, MUTT_TYPES | (pview->flags & MUTT_PAGER_NOWRAP),
3175  &priv->quote_list, &priv->q_level, &priv->force_redraw,
3176  &priv->search_re, priv->pview->win_pager)))) &&
3177  mutt_color_is_header(priv->line_info[new_topline].type))
3178  {
3179  new_topline++;
3180  }
3181 
3182  if (dretval < 0)
3183  {
3184  /* L10N: Displayed if <skip-headers> is invoked in the pager, but
3185  there is no text past the headers.
3186  (I don't think this is actually possible in Mutt's code, but
3187  display some kind of message in case it somehow occurs.) */
3188  mutt_warning(_("No text past headers"));
3189  break;
3190  }
3191  priv->topline = new_topline;
3192  break;
3193  }
3194 
3195  //=======================================================================
3196 
3197  case OP_PAGER_BOTTOM: /* move to the end of the file */
3198  if (!jump_to_bottom(priv, pview))
3199  {
3200  mutt_message(_("Bottom of message is shown"));
3201  }
3202  break;
3203 
3204  //=======================================================================
3205 
3206  case OP_REDRAW:
3207  mutt_window_reflow(NULL);
3208  clearok(stdscr, true);
3209  menu_queue_redraw(pager_menu, MENU_REDRAW_FULL);
3210  break;
3211 
3212  //=======================================================================
3213 
3214  case OP_NULL:
3215  km_error_key(MENU_PAGER);
3216  break;
3217 
3218  //=======================================================================
3219  // The following are operations on the current message rather than
3220  // adjusting the view of the message.
3221  //=======================================================================
3222  case OP_BOUNCE_MESSAGE:
3223  {
3224  if (!assert_pager_mode((pview->mode == PAGER_MODE_EMAIL) ||
3225  (pview->mode == PAGER_MODE_ATTACH_E)))
3226  {
3227  break;
3228  }
3229  if (assert_attach_msg_mode(OptAttachMsg))
3230  break;
3231  if (pview->mode == PAGER_MODE_ATTACH_E)
3232  {
3233  mutt_attach_bounce(m, pview->pdata->fp, pview->pdata->actx,
3234  pview->pdata->body);
3235  }
3236  else
3237  {
3238  struct EmailList el = STAILQ_HEAD_INITIALIZER(el);
3239  emaillist_add_email(&el, pview->pdata->email);
3240  ci_bounce_message(m, &el);
3241  emaillist_clear(&el);
3242  }
3243  break;
3244  }
3245 
3246  //=======================================================================
3247 
3248  case OP_RESEND:
3249  if (!assert_pager_mode((pview->mode == PAGER_MODE_EMAIL) ||
3250  (pview->mode == PAGER_MODE_ATTACH_E)))
3251  {
3252  break;
3253  }
3254  if (assert_attach_msg_mode(OptAttachMsg))
3255  break;
3256  if (pview->mode == PAGER_MODE_ATTACH_E)
3257  {
3258  mutt_attach_resend(pview->pdata->fp, ctx_mailbox(pview->pdata->ctx),
3259  pview->pdata->actx, pview->pdata->body);
3260  }
3261  else
3262  {
3263  mutt_resend_message(NULL, ctx_mailbox(pview->pdata->ctx),
3264  pview->pdata->email, NeoMutt->sub);
3265  }
3266  menu_queue_redraw(pager_menu, MENU_REDRAW_FULL);
3267  break;
3268 
3269  //=======================================================================
3270 
3271  case OP_COMPOSE_TO_SENDER:
3272  if (!assert_pager_mode((pview->mode == PAGER_MODE_EMAIL) ||
3273  (pview->mode == PAGER_MODE_ATTACH_E)))
3274  {
3275  break;
3276  }
3277  if (assert_attach_msg_mode(OptAttachMsg))
3278  break;
3279  if (pview->mode == PAGER_MODE_ATTACH_E)
3280  {
3281  mutt_attach_mail_sender(pview->pdata->fp, pview->pdata->email,
3282  pview->pdata->actx, pview->pdata->body);
3283  }
3284  else
3285  {
3286  struct EmailList el = STAILQ_HEAD_INITIALIZER(el);
3287  emaillist_add_email(&el, pview->pdata->email);
3288 
3289  mutt_send_message(SEND_TO_SENDER, NULL, NULL,
3290  ctx_mailbox(pview->pdata->ctx), &el, NeoMutt->sub);
3291  emaillist_clear(&el);
3292  }
3293  menu_queue_redraw(pager_menu, MENU_REDRAW_FULL);
3294  break;
3295 
3296  //=======================================================================
3297 
3298  case OP_CHECK_TRADITIONAL:
3299  if (!assert_pager_mode(pview->mode == PAGER_MODE_EMAIL))
3300  break;
3301  if (!(WithCrypto & APPLICATION_PGP))
3302  break;
3303  if (!(pview->pdata->email->security & PGP_TRADITIONAL_CHECKED))
3304  {
3305  op = -1;
3306  rc = OP_CHECK_TRADITIONAL;
3307  }
3308  break;
3309 
3310  //=======================================================================
3311 
3312  case OP_CREATE_ALIAS:
3313  if (!assert_pager_mode((pview->mode == PAGER_MODE_EMAIL) ||
3314  (pview->mode == PAGER_MODE_ATTACH_E)))
3315  {
3316  break;
3317  }
3318  struct AddressList *al = NULL;
3319  if (pview->mode == PAGER_MODE_ATTACH_E)
3320  al = mutt_get_address(pview->pdata->body->email->env, NULL);
3321  else
3322  al = mutt_get_address(pview->pdata->email->env, NULL);
3323  alias_create(al, NeoMutt->sub);
3324  break;
3325 
3326  //=======================================================================
3327 
3328  case OP_PURGE_MESSAGE:
3329  case OP_DELETE:
3330  {
3331  if (!assert_pager_mode(pview->mode == PAGER_MODE_EMAIL))
3332  break;
3333  if (!assert_mailbox_writable(m))
3334  break;
3335  /* L10N: CHECK_ACL */
3336  if (!assert_mailbox_permissions(m, MUTT_ACL_DELETE, _("Can't delete message")))
3337  {
3338  break;
3339  }
3340 
3341  mutt_set_flag(m, pview->pdata->email, MUTT_DELETE, true);
3342  mutt_set_flag(m, pview->pdata->email, MUTT_PURGE, (op == OP_PURGE_MESSAGE));
3343  const bool c_delete_untag =
3344  cs_subset_bool(NeoMutt->sub, "delete_untag");
3345  if (c_delete_untag)
3346  mutt_set_flag(m, pview->pdata->email, MUTT_TAG, false);
3347  menu_queue_redraw(pager_menu, MENU_REDRAW_STATUS | MENU_REDRAW_INDEX);
3348  const bool c_resolve = cs_subset_bool(NeoMutt->sub, "resolve");
3349  if (c_resolve)
3350  {
3351  op = -1;
3352  rc = OP_MAIN_NEXT_UNDELETED;
3353  }
3354  break;
3355  }
3356 
3357  //=======================================================================
3358 
3359  case OP_MAIN_SET_FLAG:
3360  case OP_MAIN_CLEAR_FLAG:
3361  {
3362  if (!assert_pager_mode(pview->mode == PAGER_MODE_EMAIL))
3363  break;
3364  if (!assert_mailbox_writable(m))
3365  break;
3366 
3367  struct EmailList el = STAILQ_HEAD_INITIALIZER(el);
3368  emaillist_add_email(&el, pview->pdata->email);
3369 
3370  if (mutt_change_flag(m, &el, (op == OP_MAIN_SET_FLAG)) == 0)
3371  menu_queue_redraw(pager_menu, MENU_REDRAW_STATUS | MENU_REDRAW_INDEX);
3372  const bool c_resolve = cs_subset_bool(NeoMutt->sub, "resolve");
3373  if (pview->pdata->email->deleted && c_resolve)
3374  {
3375  op = -1;
3376  rc = OP_MAIN_NEXT_UNDELETED;
3377  }
3378  emaillist_clear(&el);
3379  break;
3380  }
3381 
3382  //=======================================================================
3383 
3384  case OP_DELETE_THREAD:
3385  case OP_DELETE_SUBTHREAD:
3386  case OP_PURGE_THREAD:
3387  {
3388  if (!assert_pager_mode(pview->mode == PAGER_MODE_EMAIL))
3389  break;
3390  if (!assert_mailbox_writable(m))
3391  break;
3392  /* L10N: CHECK_ACL */
3393  /* L10N: Due to the implementation details we do not know whether we
3394  delete zero, 1, 12, ... messages. So in English we use
3395  "messages". Your language might have other means to express this. */
3396  if (!assert_mailbox_permissions(m, MUTT_ACL_DELETE, _("Can't delete messages")))
3397  {
3398  break;
3399  }
3400 
3401  int subthread = (op == OP_DELETE_SUBTHREAD);
3402  int r = mutt_thread_set_flag(m, pview->pdata->email, MUTT_DELETE, 1, subthread);
3403  if (r == -1)
3404  break;
3405  if (op == OP_PURGE_THREAD)
3406  {
3407  r = mutt_thread_set_flag(m, pview->pdata->email, MUTT_PURGE, true, subthread);
3408  if (r == -1)
3409  break;
3410  }
3411 
3412  const bool c_delete_untag =
3413  cs_subset_bool(NeoMutt->sub, "delete_untag");
3414  if (c_delete_untag)
3415  mutt_thread_set_flag(m, pview->pdata->email, MUTT_TAG, 0, subthread);
3416  const bool c_resolve = cs_subset_bool(NeoMutt->sub, "resolve");
3417  if (c_resolve)
3418  {
3419  rc = OP_MAIN_NEXT_UNDELETED;
3420  op = -1;
3421  }
3422 
3423  if (!c_resolve && (c_pager_index_lines != 0))
3424  menu_queue_redraw(pager_menu, MENU_REDRAW_FULL);
3425  else
3426  menu_queue_redraw(pager_menu, MENU_REDRAW_STATUS | MENU_REDRAW_INDEX);
3427 
3428  break;
3429  }
3430 
3431  //=======================================================================
3432 
3433  case OP_DISPLAY_ADDRESS:
3434  if (!assert_pager_mode((pview->mode == PAGER_MODE_EMAIL) ||
3435  (pview->mode == PAGER_MODE_ATTACH_E)))
3436  {
3437  break;
3438  }
3439  if (pview->mode == PAGER_MODE_ATTACH_E)
3440  mutt_display_address(pview->pdata->body->email->env);
3441  else
3442  mutt_display_address(pview->pdata->email->env);
3443  break;
3444 
3445  //=======================================================================
3446 
3447  case OP_ENTER_COMMAND:
3448  mutt_enter_command();
3449  menu_queue_redraw(pager_menu, MENU_REDRAW_FULL);
3450 
3451  if (OptNeedResort)
3452  {
3453  OptNeedResort = false;
3454  if (!assert_pager_mode(pview->mode == PAGER_MODE_EMAIL))
3455  break;
3456  OptNeedResort = true;
3457  }
3458 
3459  if ((pager_menu->redraw & MENU_REDRAW_FLOW) && (pview->flags & MUTT_PAGER_RETWINCH))
3460  {
3461  op = -1;
3462  rc = OP_REFORMAT_WINCH;
3463  continue;
3464  }
3465 
3466  op = 0;
3467  break;
3468 
3469  //=======================================================================
3470 
3471  case OP_FLAG_MESSAGE:
3472  {
3473  if (!assert_pager_mode(pview->mode == PAGER_MODE_EMAIL))
3474  break;
3475  if (!assert_mailbox_writable(m))
3476  break;
3477  /* L10N: CHECK_ACL */
3478  if (!assert_mailbox_permissions(m, MUTT_ACL_WRITE, "Can't flag message"))
3479  break;
3480 
3481  mutt_set_flag(m, pview->pdata->email, MUTT_FLAG, !pview->pdata->email->flagged);
3482  menu_queue_redraw(pager_menu, MENU_REDRAW_STATUS | MENU_REDRAW_INDEX);
3483  const bool c_resolve = cs_subset_bool(NeoMutt->sub, "resolve");
3484  if (c_resolve)
3485  {
3486  op = -1;
3487  rc = OP_MAIN_NEXT_UNDELETED;
3488  }
3489  break;
3490  }
3491 
3492  //=======================================================================
3493 
3494  case OP_PIPE:
3495  if (!assert_pager_mode((pview->mode == PAGER_MODE_EMAIL) ||
3496  (pview->mode == PAGER_MODE_ATTACH)))
3497  {
3498  break;
3499  }
3500  if (pview->mode == PAGER_MODE_ATTACH)
3501  {
3502  mutt_pipe_attachment_list(pview->pdata->actx, pview->pdata->fp, false,
3503  pview->pdata->body, false);
3504  }
3505  else
3506  {
3507  struct EmailList el = STAILQ_HEAD_INITIALIZER(el);
3508  el_add_tagged(&el, pview->pdata->ctx, pview->pdata->email, false);
3509  mutt_pipe_message(m, &el);
3510  emaillist_clear(&el);
3511  }
3512  break;
3513 
3514  //=======================================================================
3515 
3516  case OP_PRINT:
3517  if (!assert_pager_mode((pview->mode == PAGER_MODE_EMAIL) ||
3518  (pview->mode == PAGER_MODE_ATTACH)))
3519  {
3520  break;
3521  }
3522  if (pview->mode == PAGER_MODE_ATTACH)
3523  {
3524  mutt_print_attachment_list(pview->pdata->actx, pview->pdata->fp,
3525  false, pview->pdata->body);
3526  }
3527  else
3528  {
3529  struct EmailList el = STAILQ_HEAD_INITIALIZER(el);
3530  el_add_tagged(&el, pview->pdata->ctx, pview->pdata->email, false);
3531  mutt_print_message(m, &el);
3532  emaillist_clear(&el);
3533  }
3534  break;
3535 
3536  //=======================================================================
3537 
3538  case OP_MAIL:
3539  if (!assert_pager_mode(pview->mode == PAGER_MODE_EMAIL))
3540  break;
3541  if (assert_attach_msg_mode(OptAttachMsg))
3542  break;
3543 
3544  mutt_send_message(SEND_NO_FLAGS, NULL, NULL,
3545  ctx_mailbox(pview->pdata->ctx), NULL, NeoMutt->sub);
3546  menu_queue_redraw(pager_menu, MENU_REDRAW_FULL);
3547  break;
3548 
3549  //=======================================================================
3550 
3551 #ifdef USE_NNTP
3552  case OP_POST:
3553  {
3554  if (!assert_pager_mode(pview->mode == PAGER_MODE_EMAIL))
3555  break;
3556  if (assert_attach_msg_mode(OptAttachMsg))
3557  break;
3558  const enum QuadOption c_post_moderated =
3559  cs_subset_quad(NeoMutt->sub, "post_moderated");
3560  if ((m->type == MUTT_NNTP) &&
3561  !((struct NntpMboxData *) m->mdata)->allowed && (query_quadoption(c_post_moderated, _("Posting to this group not allowed, may be moderated. Continue?")) != MUTT_YES))
3562  {
3563  break;
3564  }
3565 
3566  mutt_send_message(SEND_NEWS, NULL, NULL, ctx_mailbox(pview->pdata->ctx),
3567  NULL, NeoMutt->sub);
3568  menu_queue_redraw(pager_menu, MENU_REDRAW_FULL);
3569  break;
3570  }
3571 
3572  //=======================================================================
3573 
3574  case OP_FORWARD_TO_GROUP:
3575  {
3576  if (!assert_pager_mode((pview->mode == PAGER_MODE_EMAIL) ||
3577  (pview->mode == PAGER_MODE_ATTACH_E)))
3578  {
3579  break;
3580  }
3581  if (assert_attach_msg_mode(OptAttachMsg))
3582  break;
3583  const enum QuadOption c_post_moderated =
3584  cs_subset_quad(NeoMutt->sub, "post_moderated");
3585  if ((m->type == MUTT_NNTP) &&
3586  !((struct NntpMboxData *) m->mdata)->allowed && (query_quadoption(c_post_moderated, _("Posting to this group not allowed, may be moderated. Continue?")) != MUTT_YES))
3587  {
3588  break;
3589  }
3590  if (pview->mode == PAGER_MODE_ATTACH_E)
3591  {
3592  mutt_attach_forward(pview->pdata->fp, pview->pdata->email,
3593  pview->pdata->actx, pview->pdata->body, SEND_NEWS);
3594  }
3595  else
3596  {
3597  struct EmailList el = STAILQ_HEAD_INITIALIZER(el);
3598  emaillist_add_email(&el, pview->pdata->email);
3599 
3600  mutt_send_message(SEND_NEWS | SEND_FORWARD, NULL, NULL,
3601  ctx_mailbox(pview->pdata->ctx), &el, NeoMutt->sub);
3602  emaillist_clear(&el);
3603  }
3604  menu_queue_redraw(pager_menu, MENU_REDRAW_FULL);
3605  break;
3606  }
3607 
3608  //=======================================================================
3609 
3610  case OP_FOLLOWUP:
3611  if (!assert_pager_mode((pview->mode == PAGER_MODE_EMAIL) ||
3612  (pview->mode == PAGER_MODE_ATTACH_E)))
3613  {
3614  break;
3615  }
3616  if (assert_attach_msg_mode(OptAttachMsg))
3617  break;
3618 
3619  char *followup_to = NULL;
3620  if (pview->mode == PAGER_MODE_ATTACH_E)
3621  followup_to = pview->pdata->body->email->env->followup_to;
3622  else
3623  followup_to = pview->pdata->email->env->followup_to;
3624 
3625  const enum QuadOption c_followup_to_poster =
3626  cs_subset_quad(NeoMutt->sub, "followup_to_poster");
3627  if (!followup_to || !mutt_istr_equal(followup_to, "poster") ||
3628  (query_quadoption(c_followup_to_poster,
3629  _("Reply by mail as poster prefers?")) != MUTT_YES))
3630  {
3631  const enum QuadOption c_post_moderated =
3632  cs_subset_quad(NeoMutt->sub, "post_moderated");
3633  if ((m->type == MUTT_NNTP) &&
3634  !((struct NntpMboxData *) m->mdata)->allowed && (query_quadoption(c_post_moderated, _("Posting to this group not allowed, may be moderated. Continue?")) != MUTT_YES))
3635  {
3636  break;
3637  }
3638  if (pview->mode == PAGER_MODE_ATTACH_E)
3639  {
3640  mutt_attach_reply(pview->pdata->fp, m, pview->pdata->email,
3641  pview->pdata->actx, pview->pdata->body, SEND_NEWS | SEND_REPLY);
3642  }
3643  else
3644  {
3645  struct EmailList el = STAILQ_HEAD_INITIALIZER(el);
3646  emaillist_add_email(&el, pview->pdata->email);
3647  mutt_send_message(SEND_NEWS | SEND_REPLY, NULL, NULL,
3648  ctx_mailbox(pview->pdata->ctx), &el, NeoMutt->sub);
3649  emaillist_clear(&el);
3650  }
3651  menu_queue_redraw(pager_menu, MENU_REDRAW_FULL);
3652  break;
3653  }
3654 
3655  //=======================================================================
3656 
3657 #endif
3658  /* fallthrough */
3659  case OP_REPLY:
3660  case OP_GROUP_REPLY:
3661  case OP_GROUP_CHAT_REPLY:
3662  case OP_LIST_REPLY:
3663  {
3664  if (!assert_pager_mode((pview->mode == PAGER_MODE_EMAIL) ||
3665  (pview->mode == PAGER_MODE_ATTACH_E)))
3666  {
3667  break;
3668  }
3669  if (assert_attach_msg_mode(OptAttachMsg))
3670  break;
3671 
3672  SendFlags replyflags = SEND_REPLY;
3673  if (op == OP_GROUP_REPLY)
3674  replyflags |= SEND_GROUP_REPLY;
3675  else if (op == OP_GROUP_CHAT_REPLY)
3676  replyflags |= SEND_GROUP_CHAT_REPLY;
3677  else if (op == OP_LIST_REPLY)
3678  replyflags |= SEND_LIST_REPLY;
3679 
3680  if (pview->mode == PAGER_MODE_ATTACH_E)
3681  {
3682  mutt_attach_reply(pview->pdata->fp, m, pview->pdata->email,
3683  pview->pdata->actx, pview->pdata->body, replyflags);
3684  }
3685  else
3686  {
3687  struct EmailList el = STAILQ_HEAD_INITIALIZER(el);
3688  emaillist_add_email(&el, pview->pdata->email);
3689  mutt_send_message(replyflags, NULL, NULL,
3690  ctx_mailbox(pview->pdata->ctx), &el, NeoMutt->sub);
3691  emaillist_clear(&el);
3692  }
3693  menu_queue_redraw(pager_menu, MENU_REDRAW_FULL);
3694  break;
3695  }
3696 
3697  //=======================================================================
3698 
3699  case OP_RECALL_MESSAGE:
3700  {
3701  if (!assert_pager_mode(pview->mode == PAGER_MODE_EMAIL))
3702  break;
3703  if (assert_attach_msg_mode(OptAttachMsg))
3704  break;
3705  struct EmailList el = STAILQ_HEAD_INITIALIZER(el);
3706  emaillist_add_email(&el, pview->pdata->email);
3707 
3708  mutt_send_message(SEND_POSTPONED, NULL, NULL,
3709  ctx_mailbox(pview->pdata->ctx), &el, NeoMutt->sub);
3710  emaillist_clear(&el);
3711  menu_queue_redraw(pager_menu, MENU_REDRAW_FULL);
3712  break;
3713  }
3714 
3715  //=======================================================================
3716 
3717  case OP_FORWARD_MESSAGE:
3718  if (!assert_pager_mode((pview->mode == PAGER_MODE_EMAIL) ||
3719  (pview->mode == PAGER_MODE_ATTACH_E)))
3720  {
3721  break;
3722  }
3723  if (assert_attach_msg_mode(OptAttachMsg))
3724  break;
3725  if (pview->mode == PAGER_MODE_ATTACH_E)
3726  {
3727  mutt_attach_forward(pview->pdata->fp, pview->pdata->email,
3728  pview->pdata->actx, pview->pdata->body, SEND_NO_FLAGS);
3729  }
3730  else
3731  {
3732  struct EmailList el = STAILQ_HEAD_INITIALIZER(el);
3733  emaillist_add_email(&el, pview->pdata->email);
3734 
3735  mutt_send_message(SEND_FORWARD, NULL, NULL,
3736  ctx_mailbox(pview->pdata->ctx), &el, NeoMutt->sub);
3737  emaillist_clear(&el);
3738  }
3739  menu_queue_redraw(pager_menu, MENU_REDRAW_FULL);
3740  break;
3741 
3742  //=======================================================================
3743 
3744  case OP_DECRYPT_SAVE:
3745  if (!WithCrypto)
3746  {
3747  op = -1;
3748  break;
3749  }
3750  /* fallthrough */
3751  //=======================================================================
3752 
3753  case OP_SAVE:
3754  if (pview->mode == PAGER_MODE_ATTACH)
3755  {
3756  mutt_save_attachment_list(pview->pdata->actx, pview->pdata->fp, false,
3757  pview->pdata->body, pview->pdata->email, NULL);
3758  break;
3759  }
3760  /* fallthrough */
3761  //=======================================================================
3762 
3763  case OP_COPY_MESSAGE:
3764  case OP_DECODE_SAVE:
3765  case OP_DECODE_COPY:
3766  case OP_DECRYPT_COPY:
3767  {
3768  if (!(WithCrypto != 0) && (op == OP_DECRYPT_COPY))
3769  {
3770  op = -1;
3771  break;
3772  }
3773  if (!assert_pager_mode(pview->mode == PAGER_MODE_EMAIL))
3774  break;
3775  struct EmailList el = STAILQ_HEAD_INITIALIZER(el);
3776  emaillist_add_email(&el, pview->pdata->email);
3777 
3778  const enum MessageSaveOpt save_opt =
3779  ((op == OP_SAVE) || (op == OP_DECODE_SAVE) || (op == OP_DECRYPT_SAVE)) ?
3780  SAVE_MOVE :
3781  SAVE_COPY;
3782 
3783  enum MessageTransformOpt transform_opt =
3784  ((op == OP_DECODE_SAVE) || (op == OP_DECODE_COPY)) ? TRANSFORM_DECODE :
3785  ((op == OP_DECRYPT_SAVE) || (op == OP_DECRYPT_COPY)) ? TRANSFORM_DECRYPT :
3786  TRANSFORM_NONE;
3787 
3788  const int rc2 = mutt_save_message(m, &el, save_opt, transform_opt);
3789  if ((rc2 == 0) && (save_opt == SAVE_MOVE))
3790  {
3791  const bool c_resolve = cs_subset_bool(NeoMutt->sub, "resolve");
3792  if (c_resolve)
3793  {
3794  op = -1;
3795  rc = OP_MAIN_NEXT_UNDELETED;
3796  }
3797  else
3798  menu_queue_redraw(pager_menu, MENU_REDRAW_STATUS | MENU_REDRAW_INDEX);
3799  }
3800  emaillist_clear(&el);
3801  break;
3802  }
3803 
3804  //=======================================================================
3805 
3806  case OP_SHELL_ESCAPE:
3807  if (mutt_shell_escape())
3808  {
3809  mutt_mailbox_check(m, MUTT_MAILBOX_CHECK_FORCE);
3810  }
3811  break;
3812 
3813  //=======================================================================
3814 
3815  case OP_TAG:
3816  {
3817  if (!assert_pager_mode(pview->mode == PAGER_MODE_EMAIL))
3818  break;
3819  mutt_set_flag(m, pview->pdata->email, MUTT_TAG, !pview->pdata->email->tagged);
3820 
3821  menu_queue_redraw(pager_menu, MENU_REDRAW_STATUS | MENU_REDRAW_INDEX);
3822  const bool c_resolve = cs_subset_bool(NeoMutt->sub, "resolve");
3823  if (c_resolve)
3824  {
3825  op = -1;
3826  rc = OP_NEXT_ENTRY;
3827  }
3828  break;
3829  }
3830 
3831  //=======================================================================
3832 
3833  case OP_TOGGLE_NEW:
3834  {
3835  if (!assert_pager_mode(pview->mode == PAGER_MODE_EMAIL))
3836  break;
3837  if (!assert_mailbox_writable(m))
3838  break;
3839  /* L10N: CHECK_ACL */
3840  if (!assert_mailbox_permissions(m, MUTT_ACL_SEEN, _("Can't toggle new")))
3841  break;
3842 
3843  if (pview->pdata->email->read || pview->pdata->email->old)
3844  mutt_set_flag(m, pview->pdata->email, MUTT_NEW, true);
3845  else if (!first)
3846  mutt_set_flag(m, pview->pdata->email, MUTT_READ, true);
3847  first = false;
3848  pview->pdata->ctx->msg_in_pager = -1;
3849  priv->win_pbar->actions |= WA_RECALC;
3850  menu_queue_redraw(pager_menu, MENU_REDRAW_STATUS | MENU_REDRAW_INDEX);
3851  const bool c_resolve = cs_subset_bool(NeoMutt->sub, "resolve");
3852  if (c_resolve)
3853  {
3854  op = -1;
3855  rc = OP_MAIN_NEXT_UNDELETED;
3856  }
3857  break;
3858  }
3859 
3860  //=======================================================================
3861 
3862  case OP_UNDELETE:
3863  {
3864  if (!assert_pager_mode(pview->mode == PAGER_MODE_EMAIL))
3865  break;
3866  if (!assert_mailbox_writable(m))
3867  break;
3868  /* L10N: CHECK_ACL */
3869  if (!assert_mailbox_permissions(m, MUTT_ACL_DELETE, _("Can't undelete message")))
3870  {
3871  break;
3872  }
3873 
3874  mutt_set_flag(m, pview->pdata->email, MUTT_DELETE, false);
3875  mutt_set_flag(m, pview->pdata->email, MUTT_PURGE, false);
3876  menu_queue_redraw(pager_menu, MENU_REDRAW_STATUS | MENU_REDRAW_INDEX);
3877  const bool c_resolve = cs_subset_bool(NeoMutt->sub, "resolve");
3878  if (c_resolve)
3879  {
3880  op = -1;
3881  rc = OP_NEXT_ENTRY;
3882  }
3883  break;
3884  }
3885 
3886  //=======================================================================
3887 
3888  case OP_UNDELETE_THREAD:
3889  case OP_UNDELETE_SUBTHREAD:
3890  {
3891  if (!assert_pager_mode(pview->mode == PAGER_MODE_EMAIL))
3892  break;
3893  if (!assert_mailbox_writable(m))
3894  break;
3895  /* L10N: CHECK_ACL */
3896  /* L10N: Due to the implementation details we do not know whether we
3897  undelete zero, 1, 12, ... messages. So in English we use
3898  "messages". Your language might have other means to express this. */
3899  if (!assert_mailbox_permissions(m, MUTT_ACL_DELETE, _("Can't undelete messages")))
3900  {
3901  break;
3902  }
3903 
3904  int r = mutt_thread_set_flag(m, pview->pdata->email, MUTT_DELETE, false,
3905  (op != OP_UNDELETE_THREAD));
3906  if (r != -1)
3907  {
3908  r = mutt_thread_set_flag(m, pview->pdata->email, MUTT_PURGE, false,
3909  (op != OP_UNDELETE_THREAD));
3910  }
3911  if (r != -1)
3912  {
3913  const bool c_resolve = cs_subset_bool(NeoMutt->sub, "resolve");
3914  if (c_resolve)
3915  {
3916  rc = (op == OP_DELETE_THREAD) ? OP_MAIN_NEXT_THREAD : OP_MAIN_NEXT_SUBTHREAD;
3917  op = -1;
3918  }
3919 
3920  if (!c_resolve && (c_pager_index_lines != 0))
3921  menu_queue_redraw(pager_menu, MENU_REDRAW_FULL);
3922  else
3923  menu_queue_redraw(pager_menu, MENU_REDRAW_STATUS | MENU_REDRAW_INDEX);
3924  }
3925  break;
3926  }
3927 
3928  //=======================================================================
3929 
3930  case OP_VERSION:
3931  mutt_message(mutt_make_version());
3932  break;
3933 
3934  //=======================================================================
3935 
3936  case OP_MAILBOX_LIST:
3937  mutt_mailbox_list();
3938  break;
3939 
3940  //=======================================================================
3941 
3942  case OP_VIEW_ATTACHMENTS:
3943  if (pview->flags & MUTT_PAGER_ATTACHMENT)
3944  {
3945  op = -1;
3946  rc = OP_ATTACH_COLLAPSE;
3947  break;
3948  }
3949  if (!assert_pager_mode(pview->mode == PAGER_MODE_EMAIL))
3950  break;
3951  dlg_select_attachment(NeoMutt->sub, ctx_mailbox(Context),
3952  pview->pdata->email, pview->pdata->fp);
3953  if (pview->pdata->email->attach_del)
3954  m->changed = true;
3955  menu_queue_redraw(pager_menu, MENU_REDRAW_FULL);
3956  break;
3957 
3958  //=======================================================================
3959 
3960  case OP_MAIL_KEY:
3961  {
3962  if (!(WithCrypto & APPLICATION_PGP))
3963  {
3964  op = -1;
3965  break;
3966  }
3967  if (!assert_pager_mode(pview->mode == PAGER_MODE_EMAIL))
3968  break;
3969  if (assert_attach_msg_mode(OptAttachMsg))
3970  break;
3971  struct EmailList el = STAILQ_HEAD_INITIALIZER(el);
3972  emaillist_add_email(&el, pview->pdata->email);
3973 
3974  mutt_send_message(SEND_KEY, NULL, NULL, ctx_mailbox(pview->pdata->ctx),
3975  &el, NeoMutt->sub);
3976  emaillist_clear(&el);
3977  menu_queue_redraw(pager_menu, MENU_REDRAW_FULL);
3978  break;
3979  }
3980 
3981  //=======================================================================
3982 
3983  case OP_EDIT_LABEL:
3984  {
3985  if (!assert_pager_mode(pview->mode == PAGER_MODE_EMAIL))
3986  break;
3987 
3988  struct EmailList el = STAILQ_HEAD_INITIALIZER(el);
3989  emaillist_add_email(&el, pview->pdata->email);
3990  rc = mutt_label_message(m, &el);
3991  emaillist_clear(&el);
3992 
3993  if (rc > 0)
3994  {
3995  m->changed = true;
3996  menu_queue_redraw(pager_menu, MENU_REDRAW_FULL);
3997  mutt_message(ngettext("%d label changed", "%d labels changed", rc), rc);
3998  }
3999  else
4000  {
4001  mutt_message(_("No labels changed"));
4002  }
4003  break;
4004  }
4005 
4006  //=======================================================================
4007 
4008  case OP_FORGET_PASSPHRASE:
4009  crypt_forget_passphrase();
4010  break;
4011 
4012  //=======================================================================
4013 
4014  case OP_EXTRACT_KEYS:
4015  {
4016  if (!WithCrypto)
4017  {
4018  op = -1;
4019  break;
4020  }
4021  if (!assert_pager_mode(pview->mode == PAGER_MODE_EMAIL))
4022  break;
4023  struct EmailList el = STAILQ_HEAD_INITIALIZER(el);
4024  emaillist_add_email(&el, pview->pdata->email);
4025  crypt_extract_keys_from_messages(m, &el);
4026  emaillist_clear(&el);
4027  menu_queue_redraw(pager_menu, MENU_REDRAW_FULL);
4028  break;
4029  }
4030 
4031  //=======================================================================
4032 
4033  case OP_WHAT_KEY:
4034  mutt_what_key();
4035  break;
4036 
4037  //=======================================================================
4038 
4039  case OP_CHECK_STATS:
4040  mutt_check_stats(m);
4041  break;
4042 
4043  //=======================================================================
4044 
4045 #ifdef USE_SIDEBAR
4046  case OP_SIDEBAR_FIRST:
4047  case OP_SIDEBAR_LAST:
4048  case OP_SIDEBAR_NEXT:
4049  case OP_SIDEBAR_NEXT_NEW:
4050  case OP_SIDEBAR_PAGE_DOWN:
4051  case OP_SIDEBAR_PAGE_UP:
4052  case OP_SIDEBAR_PREV:
4053  case OP_SIDEBAR_PREV_NEW:
4054  {
4055  struct MuttWindow *win_sidebar =
4056  mutt_window_find(dialog_find(priv->pview->win_pager), WT_SIDEBAR);
4057  if (!win_sidebar)
4058  break;
4059  sb_change_mailbox(win_sidebar, op);
4060  break;
4061  }
4062 
4063  //=======================================================================
4064 
4065  case OP_SIDEBAR_TOGGLE_VISIBLE:
4066  bool_str_toggle(NeoMutt->sub, "sidebar_visible", NULL);
4067  mutt_window_reflow(dialog_find(priv->pview->win_pager));
4068  break;
4069 
4070  //=======================================================================
4071 #endif
4072 
4073  default:
4074  op = -1;
4075  break;
4076  }
4077  }
4078  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------
4079  // END OF ACT 3: Read user input loop - while (op != -1)
4080  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------
4081 
4082  mutt_file_fclose(&priv->fp);
4083  if (pview->mode == PAGER_MODE_EMAIL)
4084  {
4085  pview->pdata->ctx->msg_in_pager = -1;
4086  priv->win_pbar->actions |= WA_RECALC;
4087  switch (rc)
4088  {
4089  case -1:
4090  case OP_DISPLAY_HEADERS:
4091  mutt_clear_pager_position();
4092  break;
4093  default:
4094  TopLine = priv->topline;
4095  OldEmail = pview->pdata->email;
4096  break;
4097  }
4098  }
4099 
4100  cleanup_quote(&priv->quote_list);
4101 
4102  for (size_t i = 0; i < priv->max_line; i++)
4103  {
4104  FREE(&(priv->line_info[i].syntax));
4105  if (priv->search_compiled && priv->line_info[i].search)
4106  FREE(&(priv->line_info[i].search));
4107  }
4108  if (priv->search_compiled)
4109  {
4110  regfree(&priv->search_re);
4111  priv->search_compiled = false;
4112  }
4113  FREE(&priv->line_info);
4114 
4115  if (priv->pview->win_index)
4116  {
4117  priv->pview->win_index->size = MUTT_WIN_SIZE_MAXIMISE;
4118  priv->pview->win_index->req_rows = MUTT_WIN_SIZE_UNLIMITED;
4119  priv->pview->win_index->parent->size = MUTT_WIN_SIZE_MAXIMISE;
4120  priv->pview->win_index->parent->req_rows = MUTT_WIN_SIZE_UNLIMITED;
4121  window_set_visible(priv->pview->win_index->parent, true);
4122  }
4123  window_set_visible(priv->pview->win_pager->parent, false);
4124  mutt_window_reflow(dialog_find(priv->pview->win_pager));
4125 
4126  return (rc != -1) ? rc : 0;
4127 }
